title: Dimension Parasite
description: Challenge the erosion of the Dimension Parasite and struggle in the out-of-control alien world.
body:
# **Dimension Parasite**
## Requires GeckoLib as a prerequisite!
## _Introduction_
This is a dimension-related mod created using MCreator.
It currently includes 4 new dimensions, multiple biomes, various creatures, and 8 tools.
 
The story of this mod begins with a kind of parasite from the void—they stealthily invade and infect various dimensions. Players will step into these newly eroded dimensions to explore, and only by actively devouring the parasites can they be guided to even vaster unknown dimensions!
 
## _Gameplay flow_
Head to the new biome in the Overworld, defeat and consume the infected creatures to enter the first dimension.

In the first dimension, kill the semi-infected zombies, obtain their blood and drink it to enter the second dimension.

Collect all infected foods, merge them, and consume the mixture to enter the third dimension.

Craft the dimension parasite to enter the fourth dimension and defeat the boss.
 
## _Mechanic_
Lightning deals more damage to infected creatures.

Contact with large infected creatures results in infection and injury.

Infected food can only be consumed in specific dimensions to enter the next one (for example, only consuming a parasite in the Overworld allows entry into the first dimension).

Purification Blocks will turn into infected blocks when placed in an infected dimension.

Infected creatures have a damage reduction system: the higher the weapon's damage, the less damage they take.
 
Find the Purification Crafting Table to upgrade the Blade of Purification.


### the recipes:
![Eternal Purification Core MAX](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73fc0ef7f3652aaedb5441677901c21ae4183975.png)
![Purification Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1808b756b8aba9ec503b87284e3d40279e388950.png)
![Purifier](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7135e460a78588d06ab4023d8d56e4494170c14b.png)
![Blade of Purification Lv3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/591970e24ab7d21e60e0df7ce072d1071c239f18.png)
![Blade of Purification MAX](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/496fd5cb6d7fc894f7d6c3d6d5952e07abb1e09a.png)
![Indigo-Dyed Clear Radiance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3941a36c5e7fbd97917a0cbbc7d37d899b390d51.png)
 
## _Future plans_
In the future, more weapons and equipment, more ground features, more new structures, and more monsters will be created.
 
This is my first attempt at creating a mod. If there are any bugs in the game, or areas that could be optimized or improved, please feel free to provide feedback at any time.
 
The pictures do not represent the latest game version ……
![abyssal corroded land](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87e84828f07e5dfa8ec6bc66144edd0df6a0c06b_0.webp)
